name: column-bar-chart
description: Evaluate and improve column/bar chart slides — ranked categories, labeled axes, concise proof framing
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with clear chart selection, exact numeric fidelity, and concise chart-driven action titles

prompts.text: Build a bar chart slide ranking five cloud vendors by market share: AWS 31%, Azure 24%, Google 13%, Oracle 4%, IBM 3%
Build a column chart slide showing quarterly revenue: Q1 $24M, Q2 $27M, Q3 $31M, Q4 $46M with a clear year-end acceleration message
Build a horizontal bar chart slide comparing six cost centers by annual spend with IT at $12M, Operations at $9M, Sales at $7M, Finance at $4M, HR at $3M, Legal at $2M
Build a chart slide showing NPS by quarter: 34, 39, 48, 57, 63, 68 with an action title about loyalty acceleration
Build a ranked bar chart slide comparing output across seven plants: A 420, B 390, C 365, D 341, E 330, F 298, G 275
Build a column chart slide showing hiring funnel conversion rates across sourcing 100%, screening 62%, interview 28%, offer 11%, hire 8%
Build a bar chart slide comparing regional EBITDA margins: North America 24%, Europe 19%, APAC 16%, LATAM 11%
Build a column chart slide showing monthly energy cost reductions from January $2.4M to June $1.5M
Build a bar chart slide ranking product feature adoption: dashboard 82%, alerts 64%, workflow 58%, AI insights 41%, exports 33%
Build a chart slide showing major incidents by month: 9, 8, 7, 5, 4, 2 with the message that reliability is improving faster than target
